subject: Update policy/distribution config & image version
commit_message:
Update policy/distribution config & image version

Updating the config file of distribution chart as per the new code
changes done in El Alto release.
Adding changes for policy-engine as well.

Issue-ID: POLICY-1892
Change-Id: I21d971ff76f06dd1d74884481c81801422a3971c
Signed-off-by: ramverma <ram.krishna.verma@est.tech>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

I'm not sure "SNAPSHOT" version are allowed on Master. Mike?

Patch Set 1:

If not, then may be we will hold this review until the image is released next week. Is that okay?

Patch Set 1:

IMHO it's OK.
It's also a "simple" way to check for you STAGING version (without the need of using staging branch) before releasing (nice proposal from Morgan)
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
